controls.abstention_policy: Gan 6-month seizure-free threshold; use no seizure frequency reference only when no seizure frequency information is present
controls.few_shot_policy: LabeledFewShot with synthesis-labeled demonstrations (k=4) on guardrails v2.2 direct path

hypothesis: LabeledFewShot with four synthesis-labeled train demos on the local Qwen3.6:35b guardrails v2.2 direct path teaches infrequent quantified rates without verify-repair latency cost.
metric_caveats: LabeledFewShot compiles on development train records before predicting the slice; compile time is diagnostic.
Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing on this slice only.
Normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, and evidence support are diagnostic.
Do not extrapolate slice metrics to full-validation performance.
This is not published Gan benchmark reproduction.
